items.title: Genuine superstar Kane produces his biggest England moment
items.summary: Harry Kane's England career is filled with great moments - his World Cup rescue act against DR Congo in Atlanta is his greatest, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Thomas Tuchel's flawed England squad construction is threatening their World Cup chances
items.summary: The Three Lions survived a massive scare against DR Congo, but Thomas Tuchel's questionable roster construction is already threatening to derail England's World Cup campaign
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
